name: Democrats.org
subject: Republicans are running scared (add your name)
body:
Tell the GOP not to repeal Obamacare
---
**Add your name: stand with Democrats to protect the Affordable Care Act.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd")**
Friend --

For the nearly seven years the GOP spent clamoring about "repealing and replacing" Obamacare, they never had a real plan to "replace" coverage for the millions who would lose it. They thought nobody would notice. They were wrong -- **[and we're not going to let the GOP repeal the Affordable Care Act without a fight.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7f5/4067b0a/2c2d7c00a/7e7b8979/1534210454/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+and+were+not+going+to+let+the+GOP+repeal&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd")**

Republicans are frantically trying to dodge their constituents who want answers about what's going to happen to their health care.

Virginia Congressman Dave Brat recently complained that "since Obamacare and these issues have come up, the women are in my grill no matter where I go." Another Virginia Republican, Congresswoman Barbara Comstock, skipped out on "office hours" with her constituents after dozens showed up to ask about her Obamacare replacement plan.

When Arkansans showed up at Senator Tom Cotton's office to ask about their health care, staffers locked the door and turned them away. Sixteen constituents showed up at Congressman Peter Roskam's office in West Chicago to voice their concerns about repealing the Affordable Care Act and were told their meeting had been abruptly canceled. Congressman Mike Coffman from Colorado was caught on camera sneaking out of a constituent event through a side door to avoid his constituents' questions about health care.

After more than 200 people submitted questions for a Facebook town hall with Sen. Thom Tillis, the senator logged off 11 minutes into the 30-minute event.

The Affordable Care Act is more popular than ever. Millions of Americans are reaping the benefits of access to affordable care -- and 30 million stand to lose their health care if the law is repealed.

Frankly, it's not that surprising that Republican members of Congress are too afraid to look their constituents in the eye and admit they have no health care replacement plan.

So let's make sure they hear our voices loud and clear. **We have more than 200,000 signatures telling Congress not to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- add yours today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7f5/4067b0a/2c2d7c00a/7e7b8907/1534210454/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7f5/4067b0a/2c2d7c00a/7e7b8904/1534210454/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7f5/4067b0a/2c2d7c00a/7e7b8905/1534210454/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c7f5/4067b0a/2c2d7c00a/7e7b8902/1534210454/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170205_ew_nd&source=em_20170205_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Trump=20Headquarters?=
subject: Show your support for Trump’s education nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Democrats are so close to defeating Betsy DeVos. Help us fight back. |

Friend, We need your help. Democrats are JUST ONE VOTE AWAY from blocking President Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos. Betsy has dedicated her life to fighting for greater education opportunities for children in lower-income neighborhoods, and to protecting YOUR fundamental right to send your child to the school that represents your values. We’re asking you to represent your zip code and stand with Betsy BEFORE the vote is officially cast. Please sign our official petition to show YOUR support for President Trump’s nominee for secretary of education, Betsy DeVos. We’re asking you to remind your representatives that education is the bedrock of our nation. The values we instill in our children will have dire consequences for our country’s future. Democrats want to expand the federal government’s overreach into our local schools, and further corrode your freedom and choices as a parent. Betsy understands that families should be the chief decision-makers - NOT Washington bureaucrats. Betsy’s defeat would signal a major loss for the school choice movement that has worked so hard to get where we are today. We can’t let it happen, Friend. Please speak up on behalf of your zip code to show your support. Sign our official petition to show YOUR support for President Trump’s nominee for secretary of education, Betsy DeVos. Thank you, Trump Headquarters
ADD YOUR NAME

If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

Please sign our official petition to show YOUR support for President Trump’s nominee for secretary of education, Betsy DeVos.

name: DEVELOPING (via DSCC)
subject: "extreme liberals like Elizabeth Warren"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The fight to stop Betsy DeVos' from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing, but a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate our opposition... The fight to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing, but a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate our opposition...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-devos-vote?refcode=DPE-20170205-Developing-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend -- The fight to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing.

The Senate stands at a 50-50 tie after public outrage over her unqualified nomination moved two Republican Senators to join Senate Democrats in this fight.

Calls keep pouring in -- from parents alarmed by a GOP billionaire who doesn't believe in funding all our schools or advocating for all our students, to teachers terrified of someone running public education with no experience as a school administrator or educator.

Senators from both sides of the aisle are listening to our concerns. **But a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate Senators standing against DeVos.**

**[Let's show we won't be silenced by these attacks, Friend. Will you chip in $1 to stand with us?](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-devos-vote?refcode=DPE-20170205-Developing-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The ads mock our resistance and take aim at Elizabeth Warren:

> _"Why is the radical left so full of rage and hate? They still can 't accept that Trump won and they lost. Now extreme liberals like Elizabeth Warren are trying to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming secretary of education."_

It's not a surprise GOP special interests are anteing up for DeVos after her family donated $200 million to right-wing causes. Nor is it shocking that they're targeting a Democratic Senator facing re-election in 2018.

**We knew breaking their grip on DeVos ' nomination wouldn't be easy, Friend -- but if all of us chip in what we can right now, we will be stronger to fight back and show you can't put a price on doing what's best for our kids.**

**[Pitch in $1 to show you're standing with Senate Democrats against DeVos.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-devos-vote?refcode=DPE-20170205-Developing-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")** We're counting on you.

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

clean_body: The fight to stop Betsy DeVos' from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing, but a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate our opposition... The fight to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing, but a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate our opposition... "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- The fight to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming Secretary of Education is in full swing. The Senate stands at a 50-50 tie after public outrage over her unqualified nomination moved two Republican Senators to join Senate Democrats in this fight. Calls keep pouring in -- from parents alarmed by a GOP billionaire who doesn't believe in funding all our schools or advocating for all our students, to teachers terrified of someone running public education with no experience as a school administrator or educator. Senators from both sides of the aisle are listening to our concerns. But a right-wing group just launched a $500,000 smear campaign to intimidate Senators standing against DeVos. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" The ads mock our resistance and take aim at Elizabeth Warren: "Why is the radical left so full of rage and hate? They still can 't accept that Trump won and they lost. Now extreme liberals like Elizabeth Warren are trying to stop Betsy DeVos from becoming secretary of education." It's not a surprise GOP special interests are anteing up for DeVos after her family donated $200 million to right-wing causes. Nor is it shocking that they're targeting a Democratic Senator facing re-election in 2018. We knew breaking their grip on DeVos ' nomination wouldn't be easy, Friend -- but if all of us chip in what we can right now, we will be stronger to fight back and show you can't put a price on doing what's best for our kids. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" We're counting on you.
